project: Combined passive and active network monitoring
title: Kombinovane pasivni a aktivni sitove monitorovani

metadata.agency: Technology Agency of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: 10. verejna soutez - Program na podporu aplikovaneho vyzkumu, experimentalniho vyvoje TREND, podprogram 1

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: Combined passive and active network monitoring

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: active monitoring; synthetic monitoring; hybrid monitoring; SaaS monitoring; cloud applications monitoring

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The project aims to allow network administrators to monitor cloud applications in a way that will enable them to detect potential problems in time and respond adequately to them. The user obtains information about the availability and performance of individual cloud applications. When a problem appears, it will also be possible to identify whether it is caused by an error in the local network, an error on the side of the application, or an error in the network on the side of the service provider. This will be achieved using active network monitoring techniques, through which it will be possible to send artificially created requests to cloud applications and analyze their responses to determine the health of the applications. The resulting solution will integrate active and passive techniqu
